title: Distance Tracking Check Motions of Analog I/O Board
description:
Distance Tracking Check Motions of Analog I/O Board

Check Motions of Analog I/O Board

The following steps describe how to check the motion of the analog I/O board.

(1) Make sure that the analog I/O board and the laser displacement meter (distance sensor) are connected properly.

For connection and use of the analog I/O board, refer to the following manuals:

Robot Controller RC700 / RC700-A

Setup & Operation 14.6 Analog I/O Board

Robot Controller RC90 / RC90-B (EPSON RC+ 7.0)

Setup & Operation 13.5  Analog I/O Board

(2) Execute the following command on the command window.

  >Print AIO_In(channel number of the analog I/O board)

(3) Output voltage from the laser displacement meter is displayed.

Check the displayed value and the value measured by the laser displacement meter.  If those values are the same, the analog I/O board works properly.
examples: >Print AIO_In(channel number of the analog I/O board)
